name: io.github.SathvikNayak123/ctx-capture
description: Context-window observability for LLM agents: capture and query exactly what an agent saw at every step, byte-accurately, independent of which agent framework orchestrates the calls. Capture wraps OpenAI-compatible chat-completions clients and Anthropic Messages API clients today.
title: ctx-capture

packageArguments.name: --db
packageArguments.description: SQLite database path to read/write traces from

environmentVariables.name: CTX_CAPTURE_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token required only when running with --transport http
